title: Vector Store Schema, Versioning, Tenancy, Updates, and Deletes · Program Brief: Rag Delete Tombstone Erasure
summary: A vector store keeps only embedding and text, overwrites IDs on retry, mixes tenants, cannot identify its model revision, and leaves deleted content searchable. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the delete tombstone erasure increment in versioned vector-record lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Propagate source deletion through chunks, vectors, caches, replicas, backups, logs, and verification within a stated service level.
Make ingestion and reindexing idempotent with stable keys, generation identity, checkpoints, compare-and-swap, and reconciliation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-delete-tombstone-erasure — Propagate source deletion through chunks, vectors, caches, replicas, backups, logs, and verification within a stated service level.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-vector-store-lifecycle-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-vector-store-lifecycle-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_vector_store_lifecycle_4(document_id: str = "policy-17", content_version: int = 6, index_version: int = 6, tenant_match: bool = True, tombstoned: bool = False, idempotent: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if not document_id or content_version < 1:
        return False, content_version, "document-identity"
    if index_version != content_version:
        return False, index_version, "stale-index"
    if not tenant_match:
        return False, index_version, "tenant-filter"
    if tombstoned:
        return False, index_version, "deleted-document"
    if not idempotent:
        return False, index_version, "upsert-replay"
    assert index_version == content_version
    return True, index_version, "live-vector-record"

# Evidence: rag-delete-tombstone-erasure-14g19b
# Competency: rag-delete-tombstone-erasure.
# Case 5519: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def evidence_rag_delete_tombstone_erasure_14g19b(document_id: str = "policy-17", content_version: int = 6, index_version: int = 6, tenant_match: bool = True, tombstoned: bool = False, idempotent: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_14g19b = "14g19b-b91g41-5519"
    assert evidence_variant_14g19b
    evidence_axes_14g19b = (
        "corpus14g19b",
        "queryb91g41",
        "tenant5519",
        "index14g19b5519",
        "promptb91g415519",
        "evaluation551914g19b",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_14g19b)) == 6
    if not document_id or content_version < 1:
        return False, content_version, "document-identity"
    if index_version != content_version:
        return False, index_version, "stale-index"
    if not tenant_match:
        return False, index_version, "tenant-filter"
    if tombstoned:
        return False, index_version, "deleted-document"
    if not idempotent:
        return False, index_version, "upsert-replay"
    assert index_version == content_version
